meta.question: List all signals in the PEAS-CommonServce package.
meta.finalAnswer:
There are **2 signals** in the PEAS-CommonService package:

1. **Get installed_Segment_Query**
2. **Get installed_Segment_Ack**

Both signals are located in the package path: `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Signals::APS External::PEAS-CommonService`

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("PEAS-CommonServce"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {

  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}

SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("PEAS-"))) 
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?name) = "PEAS-CommonService") .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?signal ?name WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("PEAS-CommonService"))) 
}
LIMIT 50

SELECT ?signal ?name ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?signal rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?signal vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?ownerName)), LCASE("PEAS-CommonService"))) 
}
